summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DevSync 3rd iteration new features: Resend email integration for password reset and user profile editing functionality. Both backend APIs and frontend UI integration working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Test user password changed during password reset testing, causing some test failures
minor_issues.impact: Minor - affects test consistency but not actual functionality

minor_issues.issue: Timing issues due to previous test runs causing lockout state

passed_tests: Password reset with Resend email integration (POST /api/auth/forgot-password)
Password reset end-to-end flow (forgot → token → reset → login)
Profile name validation (empty name rejected with 400)
Frontend Settings page profile editing (pencil icon, inline editing)
Frontend forgot password flow with success messages
